scripts.preprerelease: node -e "const readline=require('node:readline');const {execSync}=require('node:child_process');const run=c=>execSync(c,{encoding:'utf8'}).trim();if(run('git status --porcelain')){console.error('Git working tree is not clean');process.exit(1);}
scripts.prerelease: npm run version:pkg --bump=prerelease -w @swiftwc/ui && git commit -m "chore(ui): bumped version" && git push origin dev
